TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sayaway_a_binacadan, title = sayaway_a_binacadan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sayaway_a_binacadan} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Sayaway a binacadan akay u sayaway a kanatal, ""First Nations First Nations, Premi√®res Nations" u pinaay nu Kanata nu mapulungay a binacadan nu ngangan, nu milecaday atu Indian malecaday, mutudu' tu aydaay nu Kanata nu itidaay nu amisan nu yincumin atu laylay, nika cayay pasu inniwte a tademaw atu mayti a tademaw. :First Nations,ś≥ēŤ™ě:Premi√®res Nations), . namakacuwaay Kanata a yincumin"sayaway a binacadan" First Nations),inniwte a tademaw, Inuit, mayti" (M√©tis)amasakaputay a saupu. "(Inuit),ŚíĆ"śĘÖŤíāšļļ"(M√©tis)ÁĶĄśąź. Nika uduma a tademaw natahekal i 1970 amihcaan, sapisakaliyuh tu maydihay a micalilaw tu "Indian" . "First Nation"ŚŹĖšĽ£ŚźćÁ®ĪšłäŚéüšĺÜÁöĄ"band". nilaculan ayda"Indian" ina kamu nu hulic a sasakamuen, nika i Kanata caay tu pi cukaymas. ÁõģŚČć" . u syihu nu amilika atu duma a kanatal micukaymas tu "Native Americans" wini caay picukaymas i kanatal, itawya sa u sapangangan tu amilika nu yincumin "Native Americans" . ŚźĆś®£,"Native Canadian"šłÄŤ©ěšĻüšłćŚłłŤ¶č,ÁĄ∂ŤÄĆ"Natives"ŚíĆ"autochthones"(ŚłĆŤáėŤ©ěś†ĻautoŚíĆchthon, "ťÉ®ŤźĹ"śąĖ"śįĎśóŹ". sayaway a binacadan nu mikuwanay a syihu tapang atu milubang, idaw ku sapikuwan, tu pdekuwan, cacudadan. Nu mapulungay a kakawaw, nuhekal sapisikul atu sapisaluma nu hulic idaw ku ahebalay tu sapikuwan. Tada malakuwit ku nipicabas tu kawaw mikuwanay nu syihu cay pakalaheci sa. sayaway a binacadan nukaudip cay kakapah,nikaudip nu heni caay pakacabi tu hayti atu mahka masumaday nu tayliwku, sayaway a binacadan nayay ku kakulian, kiyu maungang misahicahica, sausin ku nikaudip nu heni, cay katalakaw, nipicuda inayay ,pakuyucay talakaw, u musabili' henay laetus tu ku biliay nayay t uku eking, caay kakapah ku udip. . unikaudip nu lutungay tahina ku maudipay, 2001 isaw ku nisausi sayaway a binacadan tatama tatayna maselep ku nikaudip .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == sajawaj a bina ¶adan akaj u sajawaj a kanatar~…ĺ, ""first nations first nations, pr…ômi*r…ôs nations" u pinaaj nu kanata nu mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a bina ¶adan nu ŇčaŇčan, nu mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj atu indian mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj, mutudu Ē~ ° tu ajdaaj nu kanata nu itidaaj nu amisan nu jin ¶umin atu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, nika ¶ajaj pasu inniwt…ô a tad…ômaw atu majti a tad…ômaw. :first nations,**:pr…ômi*r…ôs nations), . namaka ¶uwaaj kanata a jin ¶umin"sajawaj a bina ¶adan" first nations),inniwt…ô a tad…ômaw, inuit, majti" (m*tis)amasakaputaj a saupu. "(inuit),*"***"(m*tis)**. nika uduma a tad…ômaw natańß…ôkar~…ĺ i **** amińß ¶aan, sapisakar~…ĺijuńß tu majdińßaj a mi ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw tu "indian" . "first nation"********"band". nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ajda"indian" ina kamu nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a sasakamu…ôn, nika i kanata ¶aaj tu pi ¶ukajmas. **" . u sjińßu nu amir~…ĺika atu duma a kanatar~…ĺ mi ¶ukajmas tu "nati*…ô am…ôri ¶ans" wini ¶aaj pi ¶ukajmas i kanatar~…ĺ, itawja sa u sapaŇčaŇčan tu amir~…ĺika nu jin ¶umin "nati*…ô am…ôri ¶ans" . **,"nati*…ô ¶anadian"******,**"nati*…ôs"*"auto ¶ńßtńßon…ôs"(****auto* ¶ńßtńßon, "**"*"**". sajawaj a bina ¶adan nu mikuwanaj a sjińßu tapaŇč atu mir~…ĺubaŇč, idaw ku sapikuwan, tu pd…ôkuwan, ¶a ¶udadan. nu mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a kakawaw, nuńß…ôkar~…ĺ sapisikur~…ĺ atu sapisar~…ĺuma nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ idaw ku ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj tu sapikuwan. tada mar~…ĺakuwit ku nipi ¶abas tu kawaw mikuwanaj nu sjińßu ¶aj pakar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i sa. sajawaj a bina ¶adan nukaudip ¶aj kakapańß,nikaudip nu ńß…ôni ¶aaj paka ¶abi tu ńßajti atu mańßka masumadaj nu tajr~…ĺiwku, sajawaj a bina ¶adan najaj ku kakur~…ĺian, kiju mauŇčaŇč misańßi ¶ańßi ¶a, sausin ku nikaudip nu ńß…ôni, ¶aj katar~…ĺakaw, nipi ¶uda inajaj ,pakuju ¶aj tar~…ĺakaw, u musabir~…ĺi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj r~…ĺa…ôtus tu ku bir~…ĺiaj najaj t uku …ôkiŇč, ¶aaj kakapańß ku udip. . unikaudip nu r~…ĺutuŇčaj tańßina ku maudipaj, **** isaw ku nisausi sajawaj a bina ¶adan tatama tatajna mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku nikaudip .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Sayaway a binacadan akay u sayaway a kanatal, ""First Nations First Nations, Premi√®res Nations" u pinaay nu Kanata nu mapulungay a binacadan nu ngangan, nu milecaday atu Indian malecaday, mutudu' tu aydaay nu Kanata nu itidaay nu amisan nu yincumin atu laylay, nika cayay pasu inniwte a tademaw atu mayti a tademaw. :First Nations,ś≥ēŤ™ě:Premi√®res Nations), . namakacuwaay Kanata a yincumin"sayaway a binacadan" First Nations),inniwte a tademaw, Inuit, mayti" (M√©tis)amasakaputay a saupu. "(Inuit),ŚíĆ"śĘÖŤíāšļļ"(M√©tis)ÁĶĄśąź. Nika uduma a tademaw natahekal i 1970 amihcaan, sapisakaliyuh tu maydihay a micalilaw tu "Indian" . "First Nation"ŚŹĖšĽ£ŚźćÁ®ĪšłäŚéüšĺÜÁöĄ"band". nilaculan ayda"Indian" ina kamu nu hulic a sasakamuen, nika i Kanata caay tu pi cukaymas. ÁõģŚČć" . u syihu nu amilika atu duma a kanatal micukaymas tu "Native Americans" wini caay picukaymas i kanatal, itawya sa u sapangangan tu amilika nu yincumin "Native Americans" . ŚźĆś®£,"Native Canadian"šłÄŤ©ěšĻüšłćŚłłŤ¶č,ÁĄ∂ŤÄĆ"Natives"ŚíĆ"autochthones"(ŚłĆŤáėŤ©ěś†ĻautoŚíĆchthon, "ťÉ®ŤźĹ"śąĖ"śįĎśóŹ". sayaway a binacadan nu mikuwanay a syihu tapang atu milubang, idaw ku sapikuwan, tu pdekuwan, cacudadan. Nu mapulungay a kakawaw, nuhekal sapisikul atu sapisaluma nu hulic idaw ku ahebalay tu sapikuwan. Tada malakuwit ku nipicabas tu kawaw mikuwanay nu syihu cay pakalaheci sa. sayaway a binacadan nukaudip cay kakapah,nikaudip nu heni caay pakacabi tu hayti atu mahka masumaday nu tayliwku, sayaway a binacadan nayay ku kakulian, kiyu maungang misahicahica, sausin ku nikaudip nu heni, cay katalakaw, nipicuda inayay ,pakuyucay talakaw, u musabili' henay laetus tu ku biliay nayay t uku eking, caay kakapah ku udip. . unikaudip nu lutungay tahina ku maudipay, 2001 isaw ku nisausi sayaway a binacadan tatama tatayna maselep ku nikaudip .

"(inuit),*"***"(m*tis)**. nika uduma a tad…ômaw natańß…ôkar~…ĺ i **** amińß ¶aan, sapisakar~…ĺijuńß tu majdińßaj a mi ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw tu "indian" . "first nation"********"band". nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ajda"indian" ina kamu nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a sasakamu…ôn, nika i kanata ¶aaj tu pi ¶ukajmas. **" . u sjińßu nu amir~…ĺika atu duma a kanatar~…ĺ mi ¶ukajmas tu "nati*…ô am…ôri ¶ans" wini ¶aaj pi ¶ukajmas i kanatar~…ĺ, itawja sa u sapaŇčaŇčan tu amir~…ĺika nu jin ¶umin "nati*…ô am…ôri ¶ans" . **,"nati*…ô ¶anadian"******,**"nati*…ôs"*"auto ¶ńßtńßon…ôs"(****auto* ¶ńßtńßon, "**"*"**". sajawaj a bina ¶adan nu mikuwanaj a sjińßu tapaŇč atu mir~…ĺubaŇč, idaw ku sapikuwan, tu pd…ôkuwan, ¶a ¶udadan. nu mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a kakawaw, nuńß…ôkar~…ĺ sapisikur~…ĺ atu sapisar~…ĺuma nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ idaw ku ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj tu sapikuwan. tada mar~…ĺakuwit ku nipi ¶abas tu kawaw mikuwanaj nu sjińßu ¶aj pakar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i sa. sajawaj a bina ¶adan nukaudip ¶aj kakapańß,nikaudip nu ńß…ôni ¶aaj paka ¶abi tu ńßajti atu mańßka masumadaj nu tajr~…ĺiwku, sajawaj a bina ¶adan najaj ku kakur~…ĺian, kiju mauŇčaŇč misańßi ¶ańßi ¶a, sausin ku nikaudip nu ńß…ôni, ¶aj katar~…ĺakaw, nipi ¶uda inajaj ,pakuju ¶aj tar~…ĺakaw, u musabir~…ĺi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj r~…ĺa…ôtus tu ku bir~…ĺiaj najaj t uku …ôkiŇč, ¶aaj kakapańß ku udip. . unikaudip nu r~…ĺutuŇčaj tańßina ku maudipaj, **** isaw ku nisausi sajawaj a bina ¶adan tatama tatajna mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku nikaudip .
